properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 C4 V1 V3 C4 V5 C4

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Jesus, beautiful Saviour God of all majesty, risen King

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Lamb of God, holy and righteous Blessed Redeemer, bright morning star

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: All the heavens shout Your praise All creation bows to worship You

verse.name: C4
verse.lines: How wonderful, how beautiful Name above every name, exalted high How wonderful, how beautiful Jesus, Your name Name above every name, Jesus

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: I will sing forever Jesus I love You Jesus I love You
